scope: custom: combat -- ground-up damage rebuild, Build-14
note: Damage rebuilt FROM THE GROUND UP (Jordan directive 2026-05-30: pretend no prior damage formula; derive only from how the new combat resolves + how health/wounds work). SUPERSEDES the inherited formula (net + STR x mult + weapon_armour_mod; the x1/x1.5/x2/x3 multipliers; crit-doubles-mod). Damage = Impact x Coupling x Quality: Impact = Strength + Heft(weight) (ADDITIVE force, NO STR x weight multiplier -- the disliked piece removed); Coupling = Delivery(head) x Transmission(material,mode) x GapAccess(coverage), derived from material RESISTANCE-PER-MODE (percussion/shear/puncture) -- the (head x material) matrix EMERGES, replacing the +mod table and folding the weapon-vs-armour interaction into one mechanism (no double-count); Quality = degree-of-success factor (Partial .6/Success 1/Overwhelming 1.5), replacing crit-doubles-mod. One calibration constant DMG_SCALE=1.55 so an even Success hit ~= 1 WI (anchored to the wound model WI=End+6). Self-test 8/8. VALIDATED top-down across the full roster: vs none->mail->plate every weapon degrades correctly (cut collapses vs plate, point holds via gaps, blunt barely degrades; point beats cut vs mail = the rise of the thrust); heft additive (STR-gap constant across weights); Overwhelming duel blow = 1.3-2.6 wounds (decisive); pacing ~3-5 clean hits unarmoured / cut 14 vs plate (useless) / blunt 4 vs plate -- the duel/battlefield split falls out of the coupling. The wound model (WI/MW/Health) is UNCHANGED. Class C = the whole model (proposal). Reuses wa2 weapon axes + the wound model. PROPOSAL -- Jordan-vetoable; supersession flagged for ratification.

entries.quoted_text: Wound Interval = End+6; wounds computed on the fly floor(damage/WI); Max Wounds min(floor(End/2)+1,3) cap 3; Health=(End+6)x(MW+1)=WIx(MW+1); -1D per wound. Unchanged.
Overwhelming: Net>=2xOb AND net>=3. Success: Net>=Ob. Partial: Net>0 but <Ob. Overwhelming requires min 3 net regardless of Ob.
Force behind the blow = Strength + weapon heft, ADDITIVE -- no Strength x weight multiplier (the disliked lookup removed). A strong fighter does not get disproportionately more from a heavy weapon.
How well a head delivers its mode into flesh; point delivery high because concentration is the thrust's principle (defeats mail/gaps).

Material resistance per attack mode. percussion transmits through all (plate concusses); shear stopped hard by mail/plate (rings/deflection); puncture stopped on solid plate but the gaps remain. The weapon-vs-armour matrix EMERGES from this, replacing the +mod table.
Gap fraction reaching bare/gap zones (partial leaves limbs bare); degree-of-success factor (replaces crit-doubles-mod); DMG_SCALE calibrates an even Success hit to ~1 WI.
